문제: The court ruled that the contract was ______ because it lacked legal capacity.
해설: 법률행위 능력이 없으면 계약은 무효(void)가 됩니다.

문제: No citizen shall be deprived of liberty without ______ process of law.
해설: due process of law는 적법절차 원칙입니다.

문제: The witness refused to answer because the question was considered ______.
The defendant was found not guilty due to insufficient ______.

Any person who violates the regulation shall be subject to criminal ______.

해설: equal before the law는 법 앞의 평등입니다.

문제: The police obtained a search warrant from the local ______.
The lawyer advised his client not to make any further ______.

해설: 위법하게 수집된 증거는 unlawfully obtained evidence입니다.

문제: The judge dismissed the lawsuit for lack of ______.
The defendant was released on ______ until the next hearing.
The contract shall remain in effect unless terminated by mutual ______.
The court considered several factors before reaching its decision. [ ] Therefore, the defendant received a reduced sentence.
The witness testified under oath during the trial. [ ] As a result, the jury found his statement highly credible.
The company violated environmental regulations for years. [ ] Eventually, the government imposed heavy fines.
The suspect denied all accusations during questioning. [ ] Nevertheless, the prosecution continued the investigation.
The judge carefully reviewed the witness statements. [ ] Consequently, the trial lasted longer than expected.
The government introduced stricter cybersecurity laws. [ ] Many companies were required to strengthen data protection.
The contract was written in highly technical language. [ ] Therefore, both parties hired legal experts.
보기2: The agreement was easy to understand.
보기3: Several clauses were difficult to interpret.

문제: The defendant failed to appear in court on the scheduled date. [ ] The judge issued an arrest warrant shortly afterward.
The witness initially refused to cooperate with investigators. [ ] Eventually, however, she agreed to testify in court.
보기1: She feared retaliation from the suspect.

문제: The court recognized the importance of freedom of expression. [ ] However, it also noted that certain restrictions may be justified.
보기1: All speech must always be punished.
보기3: Public safety must also be protected.

문제: Neither the judge nor the lawyers (1) was aware of the missing document (2) during the trial (3) yesterday (4).
해설: Neither A nor B에서는 B(lawyers)에 수일치하여 were가 되어야 합니다.

문제: The evidence (1) collected by the police (2) were presented (3) in court yesterday (4).
Had the defendant (1) confessed earlier (2)
보기1: the trial would finish (3) much sooner (4).
column10: 가정법 과거완료이므로 would have finished가 맞습니다.

문제: The lawyer suggested that the witness (1) explains (2) the incident more clearly (3) before the jury (4).
해설: suggest that 절에는 동사원형 explain이 와야 합니다.

문제: No sooner (1) had the verdict been announced (2) when the crowd started cheering (3) loudly (4).
해설: No sooner A than B 구문이므로 when이 아니라 than입니다.

문제: The suspect denied (1) to steal (2) any confidential documents (3) from the company (4).
해설: deny는 동명사를 목적어로 취하므로 stealing이 맞습니다.

문제: The judge ordered that the illegal files (1) be removed (2) immediately (3) from the database (4).
해설: order that 절에서는 be removed가 올바른 형태입니다.

문제: Every citizen (1) are entitled (2) to equal protection under the law (3) in democratic societies (4).
해설: Every citizen은 단수이므로 is entitled가 맞습니다.

문제: The witness spoke (1) so quietly (2) that nobody could hardly (3) hear her testimony (4).
해설: could hardly는 이중 부정이 되므로 could hear가 맞습니다.

문제: If the company complied (1) with the regulations earlier (2)
보기1: it would not have faced (3) such severe penalties (4).

문제: The prosecutor emphasized (1) the importance of preserving evidence (2) during the investigation carefully (3) yesterday (4).
해설: carefully의 위치가 어색하며 during the careful investigation 등이 자연스럽습니다.

문제: The contract (1) signed by both parties (2) remain valid (3) unless terminated legally (4).
해설: 주어 contract는 단수이므로 remains valid가 맞습니다.

문제: Scarcely (1) had the trial begun (2) than the witness collapsed (3) in the courtroom (4).
해설: Scarcely A when B 구문이므로 than이 아니라 when입니다.
